song.title: Cleansed In our Savior's Precious Blood
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Cleansed in our Savior’s precious blood, Filled with the fulness of our God, Walking by faith the path He trod, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
[V2] 2) Leaning our heads on Jesus’ breast, Knowing the joy of that sweet rest, Finding in Him the chief, the best, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
[V3] 3) Kept by His pow’r from day to day, Held by His hand, we cannot stray, Glory to glory all the way, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
[V4] 4) Living in us His own pure life, Giving us rest from inward strife, From strength to strength, from death to life, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
[V5] 5) O what a Savior we have found! Well may we make the world resound With one continual joyous sound, Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
song.author: W. Spencer Walton
